description: An accountant needs to run the monthly process to calculate and post depreciation for all fixed assets.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the list of all active fixed assets from the asset register.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of all assets eligible for depreciation.

nodes.task_description: Run the depreciation calculation process for the current month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the batch process to calculate depreciation for all assets.

nodes.task_description: Post the calculated depreciation expense to the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the journal entry for the total monthly depreciation.
